description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house surrounded by a white perimeter fence and landscaped gardens. The structure features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a clean, geometric facade with a mix of white and gray exterior finishes. The property includes a spacious driveway leading to a double garage, a front yard with flowering trees, and a backyard with green lawns, mature trees, and a patio area. The house has multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance and several sliding glass doors opening to the garden. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes open space, minimalism, and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped gardens enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and two flowering trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a car parked outside, with a clear view of the backyard lawn and a detached structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with green lawn, mature trees, a patio area, and large glass doors opening to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear patio, additional garden space, and the side of the house with more windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single modern door, small steps, and minimalistic landscaping; no porch or columns.
